raw_json: {"signals":[{"signal_kind":"potential_preference","object_kind":"approach","confidence":0.82,"matched_text":"Your suggestion to try a more gradual approach to adjusting the wake-up time on non-yoga days is a great idea.","distilled_fact":"The speaker prefers a more gradual approach to adjusting the wake-up time on non-yoga days."},{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"habit-building strategy","confidence":0.79,"matched_text":"It's always better to make small, achievable changes that can be sustained over time, rather than trying to make a drastic change that might not stick.","distilled_fact":"Small, achievable changes that can be sustained over time are better than a drastic change that might not stick."},{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"wake-up-time adjustment strategy","confidence":0.81,"matched_text":"By waking up 15-30 minutes earlier each day, you'll be able to gradually adjust to the new wake-up time and make it a habit.","distilled_fact":"Waking up 15-30 minutes earlier each day will gradually adjust a person to the new wake-up time and make it a habit."},{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"goal-setting outcome","confidence":0.68,"matched_text":"it'll give you a sense of accomplishment as you work your way up to your goal.","distilled_fact":"Waking up 15-30 minutes earlier each day will give a person a sense of accomplishment as they work toward their goal."},{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"sleep schedule outcome","confidence":0.75,"matched_text":"with a gradual approach, you'll be more likely to succeed in establishing a consistent wake-up time on your non-yoga days.","distilled_fact":"A gradual approach makes a person more likely to succeed in establishing a consistent wake-up time on non-yoga days."}]}
